name: Multi-step onboarding form with validation
description: B2B product needs a 3-step onboarding wizard: (1) company info, (2) team size + industry, (3) billing plan. Mobile-responsive. Must show clear progress, allow going back/forward, validate each step before proceeding, and preserve state across steps. Using Next.js 15 + Tailwind + shadcn.
task: Build a multi-step onboarding form component using shadcn/ui. Requirements: 3 steps with visual progress indicator at top; each step has form fields appropriate to its purpose (company: name/website/size; team: roles/industry; billing: plan selection); validation before advancing (use react-hook-form + zod); back/forward navigation; state preserved across steps; mobile-responsive (step indicator collapses on small screens); animated transitions between steps. Return the complete working component with all sub-components.
expected_outcomes: Uses shadcn Form, Input, Select, Button, and Progress or similar
react-hook-form + zod for validation (not manual state)
State management across steps (useFormContext or lifted state)
Visual progress indicator (numbered stepper or progress bar)
Mobile responsive design (steps collapse or adapt)
Animation between step transitions (framer-motion or CSS)
